data.title: Qnity Electronics CFO Matt Harbaugh resigns immediately for health reasons, COO Mike Goss named interim CFO. Company confirms full-year 2025 guidance of $4.7 billion in net sales. Conducting search for permanent CFO.
data.description: Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: Q) saw a slight increase in premarket trading as it revealed that Matt Harbaugh resigned from his role as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) immediately due to health issues. Mike Goss, the company's Principal Accounting Officer and Controller, has been appointed as the Interim CFO with immediate effect. Goss brings extensive experience from his 14-year tenure at DuPont, where he held various senior positions, including Vice President, Principal Accounting Officer, and Controller. Prior to DuPont, Goss worked at Ernst & Young. The company announced plans to conduct a thorough search to fill the CFO position. Qnity reaffirmed its full-year 2025 guidance, predicting Net Sales of around $4.7 billion, slightly below the estimated $4.72 billion.

data.title: Ecuador offers cash to buy back certain notes, per announcement on Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Quito, Ecuador, the Republic of Ecuador disclosed its commencement of a cash offer to buy back notes from registered holders or beneficial owners. Each holder has the opportunity to participate in this offer. The Republic aims to purchase a specific number of notes, as detailed in the current announcement.

data.title: Equifax's Q3 2025 Market Pulse Index hits 61.6, signaling financial improvement in lower credit tiers, notably among Gen Z.
data.description: In Atlanta, on January 16, 2026, Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) announced the findings from the third quarter of 2025 Market Pulse Index. The index showed a moderate increase to 61.6 by the end of September 2025. The report highlighted significant improvements among Gen Z individuals, although there was notable variability in the data.

data.title: Austin School Fair on Jan. 31 at 11:00 AM to showcase over 40 public and private school options in one place for parents in Austin.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Austin, Texas, parents have the opportunity to explore various school options for their children on January 31. The Austin School Fair will take place at the Bullock Texas State History Museum starting at 11:00 AM. Over 40 public and private schools will be showcased, offering valuable information to families.

data.title: SU Group Holdings reports 5.6% revenue growth in FY 2025 driven by security services demand. Initiatives for long-term growth.
data.description: SU Group Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: SUGP) reported a 5.6% increase in revenue compared to the previous year, primarily driven by high demand for security-related engineering services. The company, based in Hong Kong, announced these results on January 16, 2026, highlighting its focus on long-term growth and the introduction of new initiatives.

data.title: D.C. event on Jan. 31 to showcase schools with 500-1,000 attendees expected. Opportunity for families to explore educational options.
data.description: Approximately 500 to 1,000 people are anticipated to attend a community event in Washington on January 31, 2026. The event will be a family-oriented afternoon with school displays, interactive games, and hands-on activities. Parents in the D.C. area will have the opportunity to explore a variety of school options for their children in one convenient location.

data.title: TikTok coins are meme coins on TikTok, launched on Pump Fun and traded on Solana, based on viral trends.
data.description: TikTok coins are being touted as "the next big thing in the cryptocurrency world," catching even seasoned traders like crypto expert Jordan Fish off guard. These coins, which are promoted on TikTok instead of conventional platforms like X, Telegram, or Discord, typically debut on Pump Fun (CRYPTO: PUMP) and are traded on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL ). They are influenced by viral TikTok trends, memes, and Gen Z culture rather than traditional crypto themes. Alon Cohen, the founder of Pump Fun, has already identified this emerging trend. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
